column4: I feel like the AI I interact with has a distinct personality.

column10: I frequently lose track of time while engaged in a conversation with the AI.
column11: I can rely on the AI as a safe space to discuss my personal problems.
column12: I would feel a significant sense of loss if I could no longer access my preferred AI.
column13: I view my ongoing interactions with the AI as a form of companionship.
